title: Telnyx deploys engineers to build your Voice AI Agents
full_text:
We build your Voice AI agents
Our expert Forward Deployment Engineers work side-by-side with your team to build, integrate, and deploy your custom Voice AI agents. Skip the technical complexity—we handle everything!
Contact an expert
Rapid prototyping
Build working Voice AI demos in days using your real data and workflows. Our engineers create live prototypes that prove immediate value to stakeholders.
Full integration
We handle complex API connections, write custom code, and build seamless integrations so your Voice AI agents work perfectly with existing systems.
Long-term partnership
Our engineers stay embedded with your team beyond launch, providing ongoing training, support, and strategic guidance for continued success.
Production-ready
Everything we build goes live. From sandbox testing to full production deployment with monitoring, security, and proper routing configurations.
Complete handoff
Your team gets comprehensive documentation, admin training, and support onboarding so you can confidently run and expand your Voice AI agents.
Risk mitigation
We de-risk your Voice AI adoption by solving technical blockers before and after contract signing, ensuring smooth deployments and faster time-to-value.
RESOURCES
The best voice AI Agent tools
Access Deepgram, Whisper, and other leading transcription engines through a single API. Our edge-hosted architecture lets you switch engines without rearchitecting your stack.
Learn more
TTS Router
Turn text into natural speech with 1,300+ voices across 10+ languages from leading engines like ElevenLabs and Rime. Built for real-time Voice AI with edge hosting that eliminates network round-trips.
Learn more
Integrations Hub
Connect Voice AI to your existing stack with 30+ pre-built integrations across 13 categories. From CRMs to analytics to automation platforms, deploy faster without custom development.
Learn more
TTS Library
Browse 1,300+ voices from providers like ElevenLabs, Rime, and MiniMax. Preview, compare, and find the perfect voice for your brand and audience.
Learn more
Ready to learn more?
Talk to an Expert Sign up
FAQ
What is Forward Deployed Engineering?
Forward Deployed Engineering (FDE) is a professional services offering from Telnyx where our expert engineers work directly with your team to build, integrate, and deploy Voice AI agent solutions . Unlike traditional support, FDE engineers embed with you from pre-sale proof-of-concept through production deployment, acting as an extension of your team to accelerate time-to-value and de-risk adoption.
Forward Deployed Engineering (FDE) is a professional services offering from Telnyx where our expert engineers work directly with your team to build, integrate, and deploy Voice AI agent solutions . Unlike traditional support, FDE engineers embed with you from pre-sale proof-of-concept through production deployment, acting as an extension of your team to accelerate time-to-value and de-risk adoption.
Who qualifies for free Forward Deployed Engineering services?
What's included in the FDE service?
How long does an FDE engagement typically last?
Do I need technical resources on my team to work with FDE?
How do I get started with Forward Deployed Engineering?
Can FDE help with non-Voice AI projects?
What happens after my Voice AI solution is deployed?
